{{CargoRelic
|name=Yankee Doodle
|class_id=22413
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=07-30
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Jul 30, 1777 AD, a group of British soldiers surrendered to the American army with the melody of Yankee Doodle.<br>Yankee Doodle, also called Yankee Song, is a well-known American folk tune. It's a mix of insults hurled by the British at the Americans, including "Yankee" as an insult for rural folks. But Americans liked the tune so much that they used it as a military song, and it became part of their upbeat and uncomplicated cultural heritage.
|fame=48
|art=26
|fth=20
|civ=29
|tech=31
|ss1=Tribal Amber output +2%
|ss2=Tribal Amber output +4%
|ss3=Tribal Amber output +6%
|ss4=Tribal Amber output +10%
|ss7=Tribal Amber output +10%<br>Tribal Amber output +10% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Frostsanctum skill I.png|50px]]Place in Frost Sanctum: Frost Sanctum, Glorium Output +5%
}}
